name: opensucker
description: OpenSucker — Smart Trading Matrix (frontend_user + backend + MiniFish + InfoFish orchestrator)

scripts.setup: npm-run-all -s setup:backend setup:minifish setup:infofish setup:neofish setup:frontend_user
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run python -u agent.py
scripts.dev:minifish: cd MiniFish/backend && uv run python -u run.py
scripts.dev:infofish: cd InfoFish/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 47822
scripts.dev:neofish: cd NeoFish && uv run python run_headless.py
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/.venv MiniFish/backend/.venv InfoFish/backend/.venv frontend_user/.next frontend_user/node_modules
